---
title: "About"
---

## Background

I am currently based at INSEAD, Fontainebleau campus, working as a predoc on projects spanning quantitative marketing and digital platforms. My training combines a data-science / machine-learning foundation with growing expertise in modeling.

## Education

- INSEAD predoc
- University of Rochester
- Hong Kong Polytechnic University

## Experience

- Data Scientist

## Skills

- **Languages**: Python, R, SQL
- **Methods**: structural estimation, discrete choice, Bayesian inference, applied ML
- **Tooling**: claude code!
